description: OpenGov (procurement.opengov.com) returns Cloudflare 403 to plain Req even with full Chrome headers. Options: (a) headless browser if it passes Cloudflare (see WAF-verify task), or (b) OpenGov's official Procurement API (needs API key / partner access). Investigate the API + whether creds are obtainable; otherwise rely on browser. Decide and document the per-source approach.
title: OpenGov coverage: browser vs official procurement API
